name: Preecha Chanapai
description: '''Preecha Chanapai''', more widely known by his [[stage name]], '''Lek Carabao''' ({{langx|th|ปรีชา ชนะภัย, เล็ก คาราบาว}}), is a Thai musician and singer. Chanapai is a member of [[Carabao (band)|Carabao]], a famous and popular [[Thai rock]] band and ''[[Phleng phuea chiwit]]'', a Thai [[protest song]] band.
